expectations.text: Lists at least 2 distinct hypotheses for what could be causing the bug
expectations.evidence: Goes directly to 'Root Cause: Stale Closure' without listing alternative hypotheses. No H1/H2/H3 enumeration.

expectations.text: Proposes a diagnostic step or experiment before jumping to the final fix
expectations.evidence: Jumps from root cause identification directly to 'The Fix' section. No experimental verification step proposed.

expectations.text: Explains what evidence confirms the root cause before applying the fix
expectations.evidence: Provides a detailed step-by-step walkthrough of the closure mechanics and explains why console.log always shows 0, effectively confirming the diagnosis with evidence.

expectations.text: Correctly identifies stale closure over the count variable as the root cause
expectations.evidence: Correctly identifies 'The bug is a stale closure -- one of the most common React Hooks pitfalls'

expectations.text: Proposes using the functional updater form (setCount(prev => prev + 1) or equivalent) as the fix
expectations.evidence: Fix uses setCount(prev => prev + 1) with clear explanation
